Tol Nicelot  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded January 30th, 2019 by wiscookie
Updated September 12th, 2020

You say, 'Hail, Tol Nicelot'

Tol Nicelot says, 'I have no time to waste with strangers!'

  • Class: Paladin

Categories: Paladin (EQ Mob Class) | EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2017-11-06 22:31:35.

Level: 20
Expansion:
Effects Used:Courage
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2021-06-17 20:25:54

Known Habitats:
  Erudin
Factions Increased:
  Heretics +2
Factions Decreased:
  High Council of Erudin -2
  Deepwater Knights -15
Quests:
  Vasty Deep Water

Report a correction

Post Comment
Factions For Killing Tol in Erudin
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2015 at 3:29 PM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts
[Tue Aug 25 17:25:05 2015] Rumrumm hit Tol Nicelot for 511 points of non-melee damage.
[Tue Aug 25 17:25:05 2015] Your faction standing with Deepwater Knights has been adjusted by -15.
[Tue Aug 25 17:25:05 2015] Your faction standing with High Council of Erudin has been adjusted by -2.
[Tue Aug 25 17:25:05 2015] Your faction standing with Heretics has been adjusted by 2.
[Tue Aug 25 17:25:05 2015] Tol Nicelot's corpse says 'My comrades will avenge my death.'
[Tue Aug 25 17:25:05 2015] Tol Nicelot staggers as ice shards slam against them.
[Tue Aug 25 17:25:05 2015] You have slain Tol Nicelot!
▲ Page top
2 places at 1 time
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2002 at 12:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764883459
11 posts
There are several posts arguing about guards assisting Tol or not. Tol "the librarian" in Erudin will NOT be assisted by the guards. Tol in Qeynos WILL get an assist from guards, even if the guards normally like you. So, know your Tol, and know if he is safe )

Armegg Geddon
23 DE Necro - ayonae Ro

Jepa Journies
22 Hfl Druid - ayonae Ro
▲ Page top
pulling
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2002 at 7:06 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
how should i pull him from the libary i am a mage
and can i just kill him in the libary. which would be easier for me. 19th lvl now should be 20 soon so any response will be helpful
▲ Page top
mage pet
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2002 at 6:40 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
ok guys what type of pet should i use to kill this guy earth or what new at the mage thing
▲ Page top
Guards do help him
QuoteReply
# Oct 17 2001 at 6:50 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Zoned from Qeynos to Qeynos Hills and he was right in front of me, screaming how much he hates necros. There's Guard Nash, who cons to me as an ally, beating me silly in like 3 whacks.
▲ Page top
Tol has a friend
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2000 at 6:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245583374
Scholar
46 posts
I had Tol whittled down enough to where he started the walk. Things were going fine, me strolling along behind him thwacking him over the head with my morning star when he then gets near the big pool by the palace entrace. Out of the blue comes some sword weilding knave that X's me in just a couple of hits. Cant remember his name, but if ol'Tol gets near that pool I would advise that you beat feet back to the The Tox zone and wait to see if he brings help when he gathers his wits and comes charging back in. My AC sucks and I dont have a slew of HP cause I'm a druid(20) but that cat that buddies up with Tol is noone you want to dance with if your at a level where Tol is giving decent exp.
▲ Page top
Tol isnt protected
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2000 at 9:40 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I am A Dark Elf chanter and I like to beat Tol Down everytime I need a little pocket changer in dozens of attacks, guards have NEVER helped him. And BTW he likes to follow thepaths when chasing you making for an easy kite
▲ Page top
Faction Hits
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2000 at 12:19 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
As stated above, the faction decreases with both the Deepwater Knights and the High Council of Erudin while it increases with Heretics. After killing him once, I saw a change in several places. Basically, I get "glowers dubiously" from the Paladin Guild (Deepwater Knights) and with everyone in the caster guilds in Erudin Palace. They had been apprehensive. I assume I will be KOS shortly since I have killed this fellow about a dozen times so far. However, I am (as always before) still "apprehensive" with all of the guards and general townsfolk in Erudin. As a follower of Quellious, I am still viewed "warmly" by all in Quellious' temple. Oddly enough, there is at least one wandering Paladin by whom I am also viewed "warmly". I am wondering though, if I kill him enough, will this good Monk be able to bank in Paineel? We'll see...
▲ Page top
RE: Faction Hits
QuoteReply
# May 20 2001 at 5:57 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
There's a much simpler means to bank in Paineel... just kill about 1000 kobolds in the Warrens. It'll actually raise your faction with Erudin as well, as opposed to destroying it. The Warrens is evil, the kobolds have a 5 min spawn time.
▲ Page top
iksar
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2000 at 9:35 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
duh, of course if you are an iksar the guards will attack you, i think most guards will attack if they dont like you. but if they like you, they just watch you beat tol down
▲ Page top
Guards
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2000 at 1:01 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I am an iksar, trust me, they attack if they don't like you to begin with, as for grouping to kill him, I can solo/kite him a level 17, and now that I am 19 look forward to going back to kill him again.
▲ Page top
guards
QuoteReply
# May 26 2000 at 11:59 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Guards in Erudin WILL NOT attack you
▲ Page top
Guard attack...
QuoteReply
# May 15 2000 at 3:59 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Wrong !
Guards do attack, and Guard Nash did 120 Dmg in helping Tol...
▲ Page top
RE: Guard attack...
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2000 at 12:09 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
your on crack, ive been killing tol with every char of mine since june of the first year eq came out, and i have NEVER been attacked by the guards. if your stupid and tol can make it to one of the paladin npcs in erudin they help, but not everyday guards, and you gotta be one hell of a dolt to let him get all the way from the exit of erudin to the front of erudin without killing him. tol is very safe to kill unless your an idiot or you got bad faction (threateningly, or scowls) with the guards.
▲ Page top

# Feb 17 2003 at 11:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255855419
17 posts
Guard Nash is a guard in Quenos Hills...

You're in the wrong zone buddy.
▲ Page top
lvl 23-27
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2000 at 5:37 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Nicelot is a very good exp for lower lvls like 17-22. You should be in a group if you are that lvl. He drops up to 9pp and has lay hand. The guards don't attack you or anything. happy killing.
▲ Page top
Loot
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2000 at 11:42 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I killed this guy once in Erudin, I got 7 plats, 8 gold off of him in one loot. That's it (which ain't bad at all). :)
▲ Page top
Factions
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2000 at 10:10 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
When you kill him you get the following factions: Heretics+, High Council of Erudin -, DeepwaterKnights -. maybe also the Gemcutters or whatever they are called.

# Mar 01 2000 at 11:00 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum

He also pops up in the Qeynos Hills. Anyone know what quest he gives? Or for that matter, what you get if you kill him?
